---
title: "Nona Maria Stevenson Bellairs"
---

## Nona Maria Stevenson Bellairs

**Dates:** (1823/4-1897)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1866), author of fiction and non-fiction 1848-1885

### Biography

The daughter of the Rev. Henry Bellairs, Rector of Bedworth, Warwickshire, she lived in Bournemouth for the latter part of her life.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
